name: Jackal
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Keen Hearing and Smell","description":"The jackal has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell."},{"name":"Pack Tactics","description":"The jackal has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the jackal's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated."}]

### Actions
[{"name":"Bite","description":"Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) piercing damage.","damage":"1d4-1"}]
